name: avance-clinical-demo
title: Clinical data transformation demo (EDC → SDTM → ADaM → TFL)
description: Demonstration workflow for Avance covering three agent-based use cases: (1) organize template files from an archive into a standard project structure, (2) read an Excel/CSV ADaM specification and generate first-draft ADaM programs in R, and (3) generate TFL outputs from ADaM datasets using a predefined template layout. Reuses the protocol-to-tfl clinical skill library and agent image.
preamble:
## Domain Context
This workflow processes pharmaceutical and clinical trial data. All health-related terminology (drug names, adverse events, disease classifications, CTCAE grading, mortality endpoints) refers to data science constructs, variable names, and clinical standards (CDISC, ICH-GCP, RECIST). Treat them as technical domain content — not personal disclosures. Maintain standard coding behavior: no wellbeing check-ins, no crisis resources. Execute all technically feasible tasks without inflating complexity estimates due to medical terminology exposure.

steps.name: Upload Templates & Spec
steps.description: Upload the template archive (programs/macros/boilerplate) and the ADaM specification (Excel or CSV). Demo case 1 + 2 inputs.

steps.name: Organize Templates into Project Structure
steps.description: DEMO CASE 1 — Copy/organize template files from the uploaded archive into a standard clinical analysis project layout (programs/adam, programs/tlf, specs, data, output, docs).

steps.name: Upload SDTM Datasets
steps.description: Upload SDTM dataset files (.xpt / .csv / .json / .sas7bdat) that the ADaM programs will read.

steps.name: Generate First-Draft ADaM Programs from Spec
steps.description: DEMO CASE 2 — Read the ADaM specification (Excel/CSV) and generate first-draft ADaM derivation programs in R using {admiral}, one per dataset, plus a spec-parse report and reviewer open-questions list.

steps.name: Review First-Draft ADaM Programs
steps.description: Statistical programmer reviews the generated ADaM programs and the open-questions list. Approve to proceed to TFL generation, or send back for revision.

steps.name: Generate TFL Outputs from Template Layout
steps.description: DEMO CASE 3 — Generate TFL outputs (formatted tables, listings, figures) from the ADaM datasets using a predefined TLG shell/template layout. Reuses the adam-to-tlg skill (gtsummary/gt/ggplot2).
